summary: Frontend-only smoke + integration testing for Denizio's IA landing page. All requested flows passed: Hero loads with correct headline, CTAs point to wa.me/5512988217813, all sections render (Navbar, PhoneMockup, Plans, Footer), Business plan is highlighted as 'Mais escolhido', floating WhatsApp popup opens and CTA links correctly, floating AI chat opens, accepts input, sends with click, and returns the correct keyword-matched response containing 'R$' for 'preço'. Footer shows phone (12) 98821-7813, email crysdeniziomarketingdigital@gmail.com and Instagram @deniziosautomacao. Mobile (390x844) hamburger toggle works and reveals nav links. No console errors detected.

issues:
Headline 'Sua empresa merece atendimento inteligente24h por dia.' renders without space because the
between 'inteligente' and '24h' is preserved visually but text_content concat. No actual UI issue – cosmetic note only.

critical_code_review_comments: Code well-structured, data-testid attributes present on all critical interactive elements.
WHATSAPP_LINK helper centralizes the WhatsApp URL — good DRY practice.
Chat IA is purely simulated (keyword matching) as specified — no LLM calls (MOCKED as per spec).
No backend integration exists by design — frontend is fully static.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static landing page, no backend. Floating AI chat is MOCKED locally. All wa.me CTAs target +5512988217813. Tested desktop 1920x1080 and mobile 390x844.
